description: CCP-9 Rendezvous Mechanisms vectors from da2q context (updated per project-LICHEN-3i18.4). Includes scheduler rx_channel (default 0/control, from select_channel(); wire byte at offset 1 in L2 announce, signed_data offset 42 after seq_num). Hash-based, scheduled, announce-driven (rx_channel from last Announce per CCP-9), fallback. Independent oracle; Python sim is source of truth. Matches updated 02a.3 and 05-routing.9.2.

vectors.name: hash_based_peer_rendezvous
vectors.description: Hash-based rendezvous per 2a.3.2. channel = 1 + hash_32(sfn, peer_eui) % (n_ch-1). Independent expected from external FNV calc.

vectors.name: scheduled_rendezvous
vectors.description: Scheduled rendezvous from beacon/DIO assignment (CCP-9 primary mechanism).

vectors.name: announce_driven_rendezvous
vectors.description: Announce-driven: use rx_channel from last Announce for peer (CCP-9). da2q context.

vectors.name: fallback_control_channel
vectors.description: Fallback to control channel (CH0) + contention slot when other mechanisms fail.
